會上Twitter做文宣嘅手足，記得用 #antiELAB 呢個hashtag

呢個hashtag係所有媒體同記者都會用
當然，你未爆character limit都可以再加埋 #hongkong #hongkongprotests
有時唔需要多字，只需要一張新聞圖片，簡單幾句caption解釋返張圖

例如：Riot police fired tear gas inside the Kwai Fong MTR Station, violating the usage guidelines (no tear gas should be deployed indoors). Passengers including elderly & children were affected. #antiELAB

善用thread功能：你寫完一個tweet，可能仲有啲個人意見想講，又或者爆左character limit，咁就撳下 "+" 掣，你可以繼續expand into a thread，人地可以一睇睇晒成串post。

大家加油！
